name: Ai Npc
description: Advanced AI-powered NPC with conversational abilities, autonomous behavior, and physical interactions. This behavior creates intelligent NPCs that can engage in natural voice or text conversations, perform physical actions in the game world, and react to their environment dynamically.
documentation:
## AI NPC
Create AI-powered NPCs that can chat with players using text or voice.

### Profile & Voice
- **AI NPC Profile** - Select a pre-configured NPC personality
- **Voice** - Choose from 20+ ElevenLabs voice personas
- **Active In Voice Chat** - Enable voice conversation
- **Show Text Chat** - Display text chat bubble

### Movement & Range
- **Range** - How close the player must be to interact
- **Object Interaction Range** - Range for interacting with scene objects
- **Walk/Run Speed** - NPC movement speeds
- **Roam Distance** - How far the NPC wanders from its origin

### World Context
- **Environment** - Describes the NPC's world (e.g. "fantasy village")
- **Groups** - Social groups the NPC belongs to

### Animations
Assign animations: Idle, Walking, Running, Pick Up, Talking, Wave, Point gestures.

### Tips
- Configure personality through the NPC Profile resource
- NPC conversations are stored per scene in MongoDB
- Requires Firebase authentication for AI endpoints
author: stemstudio

npc_profile.name: AI NPC Profile
npc_profile.description: The pre-configured NPC personality profile that defines this NPC's backstory, knowledge, and conversational style.

voice_id.name: Voice
voice_id.description: The ElevenLabs voice persona used for text-to-speech when the NPC speaks aloud.

range.name: Range
range.description: How close the player must be to the NPC to start a conversation or interaction.

object_interaction_range.name: Object Interaction Range
object_interaction_range.description: Maximum distance at which the NPC can detect and interact with objects in the scene.

walkSpeed.name: Walk Speed
walkSpeed.description: Movement speed of the NPC when walking, in units per second.

runSpeed.name: Run Speed
runSpeed.description: Movement speed of the NPC when running, in units per second.

active_in_voice_chat.name: Active In Voice Chat
active_in_voice_chat.description: When enabled, the NPC listens for voice input and responds with spoken audio instead of text only.

show_text_chat.name: Show Text Chat
show_text_chat.description: When enabled, displays a text chat bubble above the NPC so players can read the conversation.

roamDistance.name: Roam Distance
roamDistance.description: Maximum distance the NPC can wander from its original position when idle. Leave empty to disable roaming.

environment.name: Environment
environment.description: A text description of the NPC's world setting, provided as context to the AI for more immersive conversations.

groups.name: Groups
groups.description: Social groups or factions the NPC belongs to, used for AI context and inter-NPC relationships.

idleAnimation.name: Idle
idleAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is standing still and not engaged in any activity.

walkAnimation.name: Walking
walkAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is walking.

runAnimation.name: Running
runAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is running.

pickUpAnimation.name: Pick Up Gesture
pickUpAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC picks up or grabs an object.

talkAnimation.name: Talking
talkAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is speaking during a conversation.

waveAnimation.name: Wave Gesture
waveAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC waves or greets a player.

pointAnimation.name: Point Gesture
pointAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC points at something in the scene.
